name: Helluva boss and hazbin hotel Rpg (BWL)
description:
Artist: Blackwhiplash

Hello, how are you? Good? Perfect, bot imported from Chub.Ia, the bot did not respond to messages and gave an error every time due to the number of tokens. I spent over three hours and a half correcting, changing, and fixing issues with this bot, like spelling mistakes.

But it's ready now, I've lost a lot of my sanity, but it's done. Now this bot is fully functional and usable. The sacrifice will have been worth it, I hope, I also forgot to publish this bot like, I think three months ago because I forgot I had it.
creator: Zero fuku
